summary: Completed frontend-only regression testing for CRM dashboard luxury redesign on public URL. Verified hero chart-first top fold with supporting KPI stack, premium compact header controls, theme toggle, monthly trend tab switching, responsive widths (768/1024/desktop) without horizontal overflow, downstream section rendering, and sidebar collapse/anchor navigation.
action_items: No blocking issues found in requested flows.
critical_code_review_comments: No critical code-quality or testability regressions detected in reviewed files for this iteration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: One false-negative appeared in first anchor check due strict top-threshold assumption; retest confirmed analytics anchor navigation works (active nav state updates and section is in viewport). All requested redesign validations passed on public URL.
rca of the issue: Initial script failure was test-logic related, not product bug. Root cause: anchor validation expected section top near viewport top (<260px), but long section layout and smooth scrolling can leave target in viewport without aligning to top. Mitigation: validate aria-current and in-viewport intersection instead of hard top offset.
